printed.name: Hip Opener
printed.setup: Lying on side in neutral spine position (as close as possible), bottom arm straight, head resting on arm, pelvis perpendicular to Mat, top arm holding pole, hips externally rotated, feet plantarflexed, bottom leg straight, aligned with trunk, top leg bent, toes placed on PTBar

movement.inhale: Bend leg, return to start position

cues: Keep bottom leg straight and active
Direct top knee toward or behind upper shoulder as it bends
